ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the property */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "phone_no" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the property */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the property is located */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial, land) */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sq_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" TEXT /* Size of the lot */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_no" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Code for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_no" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent's agency */,
  "agency_address" TEXT /* Address of the agent's agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_agents" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the property */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_no" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the inquiry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being inquired about */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "inquiry_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the inquiry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewings" (
  "viewing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client viewing the property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "viewing_date" TEXT /* Date the viewing took place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the viewing */,
  "viewing_status" TEXT /* Status of the viewing (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the purchase */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was made */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the purchase */,
  "purchase_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "payment_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender of the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "message_status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., contract, receipt) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was shared */,
  "document_content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)
